subject: [AAF] SSHSM testCA request/values are too low
commit_message:
[AAF] SSHSM testCA request/values are too low

When using requests/limits, testCA jobs gets OOMKIilled.
Giving more RAM in order to make it work.

Issue-ID: OOM-2408
Signed-off-by: Sylvain Desbureaux <sylvain.desbureaux@orange.com>
Change-Id: I221cba103a939b77009aa8c04da2425ab8eeae82

entries.message:
Patch Set 1:

Gitlab controller: Deployment put on queue, number 1 on the queue.

Patch Set 1:

Gitlab Orange 4: Chained-CI build started, max time: 14400 seconds

Patch Set 1: Verified+1
